| MSME s, Start-up s and Organizations may communicate for contract research and customized training in Quality control, Biomedical, Clinical and allied fields as per Govt. norms. M.Sc, M.Tech, B.Sc, B.Tech students with specific interest in the field of Protein and Nucleic acid simulations, Computational biology and Proteomics, Cell and Molecular Biology can directly contact me for projects and dissertations. |
| 2** Dr Manash C. Das** |
| Designation | Lecturer (Selection Grade) | |
| Qualification | M. Tech (Biotechnology), Ph.D (Molecular Biology and Bioinformatics) |
| Areas of Interest | Nano-biotechnology, Microbial Structural Biophysics |
| Email: | manashmbt@gmail.com |
| Contact: | 9774788452 |
| Web Profile | [**Click here for detail biodata**] |
| Motivated B.Tech/M.Sc./M.Tech students interested to undergo Dissertation work/ Summer Project/ Winter project/ Short term project in Bacterial Biophysics or Nano-biotechnology can apply with their updated CV. Send your application to Dr. Manash C. Das at manashmbt@gmail.com |
